commands.review_summary:
This PR adds Workboard CLI and `/workboard` command surfaces, changes Workboard dispatch to claim ready cards and start subagent worker runs with persisted session/run metadata, updates Workboard docs, and adjusts SMS tests.

PR surface: Source +689, Tests +387, Docs +325. Total +1401 across 16 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defects by source inspection: PR-head `list/create/show` use `params.store` directly while current Gateway calls honor remote target configuration, and PR-head dispatch changes the existing Gateway method to start workers. I did not run a live command because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed for the protected maintainer label, changed dispatch permission/session semantics, dirty merge state, and missing live behavior proof.
